data.title: HTTPS Everywhere
data.description: Ensures secure communication by enforcing HTTPS across all transactions and user interactions.

data.title: Advanced Web Application Firewall
data.description: Deploys a web application firewall to protect against common threats like XSS and SQL injection.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Infrastructure is designed to absorb and mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security audits and penetration testing to identify and fix vulnerabilities.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Sensitive data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to ensure privacy and data integrity.
